title: libpod: limit splitting of cgroup fields
body:
Apparently paths can have colons in them, and this completely breaks parsing:

Error: could not find any cgroup in "/proc/6080/cgroup"
$ cat /proc/6080/cgroup
0::/user.slice/user-10000.slice/user@10000.service/app.slice/app-dbus\x2d:1.2\x2dorg.gnome.Console.slice/3809f153fce7324de5298d0d9b2782bb76f75f4603c2085acce13f71348c1fb6

This limits the split to 3 fields, so that colons in the path don't cause problems.

I'm a bit new to this codebase, but IIUC I'd have to refactor this a bit to make unit testing possible, since cGroupPath reads /proc directly? Just want to check my understanding before I start doing anything drastic :P
yes, we need to test only the part that does the parsing, without reading any file

thanks everyone for the feedback.

V2:

- split off parsing logic, added tests
- fixed bug with `:` in path, added a test for it
